claim: Output Styles updates the system prompt of Claude Code to change response formatting, not model behavior; mastering context, model, and prompt (the big three) enables rapid adaptation across tools
actionable: Treat output styles as system prompt modifications; understand that every agentic tool change fundamentally affects one of the big three
